title: Propagate body-level errors in WebClientStreamableHttpTransport
body:
## Summary

When `WebClientStreamableHttpTransport.sendMessage()` encounters a body-level error (e.g. `DataBufferLimitException`, malformed JSON), the `onErrorComplete` operator silently swallows the error. This PR propagates these errors to the caller via the response sink.

## Changes

- Replace `onErrorComplete` with `doOnError` + sink error propagation
- Add integration test for body-level error scenarios

Fixes https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/java-sdk/issues/889
